source.update_note: 2026-27 upland game bird data from AZGFD. Arizona has quail (3 species), chukar, grouse, pheasant, and turkey.

species.name: Quail (Gambel's, Scaled & Mearns')
species.season_raw: Gambel's & Scaled: Oct 17 - Feb 8; Mearns': Dec 5 - Feb 8

species.name: Ring-necked Pheasant
species.season_raw: Limited Weapon: Sep 1-15; Archery: Oct 17 - Feb 8

species.name: Wild Turkey (Spring)
species.season_raw: Merriam's: Apr 25 - May 22 (varies by hunt); Gould's: May 9-22

species.name: Wild Turkey (Fall)
species.season_raw: Archery: Aug 22 - Sep 11; Shotgun: Oct 3-9; Youth: Oct 3-13

key_notes.title: Arizona has 3 quail species: Gambel's, Scaled (blue), and Mearns' (Montezuma). Mearns' quail season starts later (Dec 5) than other quail (Oct 17). Combined bag is 15 daily.

sources.label: AZGFD — Quail Seasons
sources.evidence: Gambel's & Scaled: Oct 17 - Feb 8. Mearns': Dec 5 - Feb 8. 15 daily combined.

key_notes.title: Pheasant has two seasons: Limited Weapon (shotgun) Sep 1-15 with 2 cocks daily, and Archery Oct 17 - Feb 8 with 2 either sex.

sources.label: AZGFD — Pheasant Season
sources.evidence: Pheasant: Limited Weapon Sep 1-15. Archery Oct 17-Feb 8.

key_notes.title: Arizona has both Merriam's and Gould's wild turkey subspecies with different spring season dates. Spring turkey is by draw permit.

sources.label: AZGFD — Turkey Seasons
sources.evidence: Spring turkey: Merriam's Apr 25 - May 22; Gould's May 9-22. Draw required.

key_notes.title: Grouse season runs Sep 1 - Nov 9 with a 3-bird daily bag. Chukar runs longer (Sep 1 - Feb 8) with a 5-bird daily bag.

sources.label: AZGFD — Grouse & Chukar
sources.evidence: Grouse: Sep 1-Nov 9, 3 daily. Chukar: Sep 1-Feb 8, 5 daily.
